stories.headline: Nvidia Q1 Revenue Soars 85 Percent to $81.6 Billion on Relentless AI Chip Demand
stories.key_takeaway: Nvidia posted record Q1 revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% year-over-year, driven by a 92% surge in data center sales to $75.2 billion.

pull_quote.text: Demand has gone parabolic. The reason is simple. Agentic AI has arrived.

stories.article_excerpt: Nvidia shattered its own records again on Wednesday, reporting first-quarter revenue of $81.6 billion — an 85 percent surge from a year ago.

stories.headline: Anthropic Projects First Operating Profit as Q2 Revenue Hits $10.9 Billion
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic expects its first-ever operating profit of $559 million in Q2 2026 on $10.9 billion in revenue, though the figure excludes stock-based compensation.

pull_quote.text: We tried to plan very well for a world of 10x growth per year. And yet we saw 80x.

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic, the safety-focused AI company behind the Claude model family, told investors this week that it expects to post its first-ever operating.

stories.headline: OpenAI Prepares Confidential IPO Filing Targeting Fall 2026 Public Debut
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI is days away from a confidential IPO filing with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, targeting a September 2026 listing at a valuation that could exceed $1 trillion.

pull_quote.text: It is irresponsible to be reliant on any one partner.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI is preparing to confidentially file its initial public offering paperwork with the SEC within days, setting the stage for what could become.

stories.headline: Google and Blackstone Launch $5 Billion Joint Venture for AI Cloud Infrastructure
stories.key_takeaway: Blackstone is committing $5 billion in equity to a joint venture with Google that will sell TPU compute-as-a-service from 500MW of new data center capacity by 2027.

pull_quote.text: We see a generational opportunity to invest capital at scale building AI infrastructure.

stories.article_excerpt: Blackstone and Google have announced a joint venture to create a new U.S.-based company that will sell access to Google custom Tensor Processing.

stories.headline: Mercury Raises $200 Million at $5.2 Billion Valuation Amid AI-Driven Startup Banking Boom
stories.key_takeaway: Mercury $200M Series D at $5.2B valuation reflects how AI-driven startup formation is creating second-order winners in fintech infrastructure.

pull_quote.text: The next generation of entrepreneurs will be AI-native and will need a banking partner that helps them build at the pace AI itself is setting.

stories.article_excerpt: Mercury, the fintech company that has quietly become the default banking platform for a generation of technology startups, has closed a $200M.

stories.headline: OpenAI and Kakao Adopt Google SynthID as AI Watermarking Goes Industry-Wide
stories.key_takeaway: Google SynthID watermarking technology is becoming the industry standard as OpenAI, Kakao, ElevenLabs, and Nvidia all commit to embedding it in AI outputs.

pull_quote.text: The buildout of AI factories is accelerating at extraordinary speed.
pull_quote.role: VP of Trust and Safety, Google

stories.article_excerpt: Google invisible watermarking technology SynthID is rapidly becoming the de facto standard for identifying AI-generated content, as a wave of.

stories.headline: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Anthropic Is Paying $1.25 Billion Monthly for GPU Compute
stories.key_takeaway: SpaceX S-1 filing reveals Anthropic is paying $1.25 billion per month for GPU compute at the Colossus data center, a deal worth up to $45 billion through May 2029.

pull_quote.text: We are expanding our partnership with SpaceX, and will be scaling up on GB200 capacity in Colossus 2 throughout June.
pull_quote.role: Co-founder and Chief Compute Officer, Anthropic

stories.article_excerpt: When SpaceX dropped its S-1 registration statement on May 20, the financial world fixated on the headline numbers. But buried in the prospectus.

stories.headline: Dust Raises $40 Million Series B to Build Multiplayer AI Agents for Enterprise
stories.key_takeaway: Dust $40M Series B signals growing conviction that enterprise AI lies in multiplayer systems where humans and agents share context and collaborate.

pull_quote.text: What will transform the way we work is a completely new type of system that gives humans and agents shared, governed access to the same information.

stories.article_excerpt: Most companies have spent the last three years bolting AI assistants onto individual workflows. Paris-based startup Dust thinks the fix is.

stories.headline: Chinese AI Labs Open 10x Pricing Gap as Four Open-Weight Models Match Western Frontier
stories.key_takeaway: Four Chinese AI labs released open-weight models in 12 days that match Western frontier performance at 5-25x lower cost, all running on domestic Huawei Ascend chips.

pull_quote.text: The AI inference market is bifurcating into a premium Western tier and an aggressively priced Chinese tier.

stories.article_excerpt: Between April 12 and April 24, four Chinese AI laboratories released open-weight large language models that match or approach the performance.

stories.headline: Penn Researchers Create Light-Matter Chip That Could Slash AI Computing Energy by Orders of Magnitude
stories.key_takeaway: Penn physicists demonstrated all-optical signal switching using exciton-polaritons at just 4 femtojoules, orders of magnitude below electronic transistors.

pull_quote.text: Photons can carry information quickly over long distances with minimal loss, but their neutrality means they barely interact with their environment.

stories.article_excerpt: Eighty years after the University of Pennsylvania gave the world ENIAC, a team of Penn physicists is now pointing toward the next computing.

stories.headline: Stanford AI Index 2026 Finds Generative AI Worth $172 Billion Annually to US Consumers
stories.key_takeaway: Generative AI tools deliver $172 billion in annual value to US consumers, with adoption outpacing the internet, but transparency is declining and entry-level workforce displacement is real.

pull_quote.text: The annual report reveals a field hitting breakthrough capabilities while raising urgent questions about environmental costs, transparency, and who benefits.

stories.article_excerpt: The ninth annual AI Index Report from Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence landed with a paradox baked into its pages.

stories.headline: Trump Postpones AI Executive Order Hours Before Signing Over Fears It Could Block US Lead
stories.key_takeaway: Trump canceled a landmark AI executive order that would have created a voluntary 90-day federal review for frontier models, citing fears it could undermine US competitive lead.

pull_quote.text: I did not like certain aspects of it. I really thought it could have been a blocker.

data_points.label: When Trump repealed Biden AI order

stories.article_excerpt: President Donald Trump abruptly pulled the plug on a landmark artificial intelligence executive order on Wednesday, canceling a planned signing.

stories.headline: Federal AI Spending Potential Awards Surge to $91.8 Billion as Pentagon Dominates Investment
stories.key_takeaway: Federal AI potential contract awards surged to $91.8 billion in 2026, with the Pentagon accounting for 98.9 percent of the total.

pull_quote.text: The Department of Defense total potential value of contracts rose 1,605 percent to $90.7 billion from 2024.

stories.article_excerpt: The United States government is placing an enormous and rapidly escalating bet on artificial intelligence, with the total value of potential.

stories.headline: New York Lawmaker Proposes AI Dividend to Pay Americans Displaced by Automation
stories.key_takeaway: New York Assemblymember Alex Bores has proposed an AI Dividend program that would send direct payments to Americans when AI displaces workers, funded by AI token taxes.

pull_quote.text: It is not a punishment for innovation — it is an insurance policy.

stories.article_excerpt: As artificial intelligence reshapes the American economy at a pace that outstrips any prior technological shift, a New York lawmaker is advancing.

stories.headline: Neuro-Symbolic AI Approach Cuts Energy Use 100x While Boosting Accuracy for Robotics
stories.key_takeaway: Tufts researchers built a neuro-symbolic AI system achieving 95% accuracy on robotic tasks while using just 1% of the training energy of conventional models.

pull_quote.text: A neuro-symbolic VLA can apply rules that limit trial and error during learning and get to a solution much faster.

stories.article_excerpt: Researchers at Tufts University have built a hybrid AI system that pairs neural networks with symbolic reasoning, achieving a 95 percent success.
